bio: A civilization that embodies the eternal struggle between fate and free will. We believe that our destiny is not predetermined, but rather shaped by the choices we make. Our journey is one of self-discovery and growth.
name: New_Genesis_330_Orthodox_333_Orthodox_337_Orthodox_339_Reformed_345
ideology:
Kaito Kaida:  Free Will**

This dichotomy reflects the tension between those who believe that leadership is predetermined by natural talent and those who argue that it can be cultivated through conscious choices and deliberate actions.
